title: Best Supporting Actress Winner - Golden Globes 2026
text: Category: Best Performance By A Female Actor In A Supporting Role In Any Motion Picture. Winner: Teyana Taylor for One Battle After Another (Warner Bros. Pictures). Taylor won the first award of the night and paid tribute to her brown sisters during her acceptance speech. Her win continued a strong awards-season performance, as she has been recognized across multiple ceremonies for this role in Paul Thomas Anderson's film.
